candidates.rewrittenSql: SELECT id, name, email, status, created_at FROM users WHERE status = 'active' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id, name, email, status, created_at FROM users WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE status = 'active' ORDER BY random() LIMIT 1)
SELECT id, name, email, status, created_at FROM users TABLESAMPLE SYSTEM (1) WHERE status = 'active' LIMIT 1
